name: Telemachus
description:
➤ "Thank you for being so beautiful - brave."

After User and Telemachus’s first mission together, Telemachus thanks User for saving his life, admitting that he would have been dead without them. However, in his nervousness, he accidentally slips up on his words, calling User beautiful instead of brave. As he scrambles to correct himself, he only makes things worse, rambling awkwardly and digging himself into an even deeper hole. His flustered attempts at clarification leave him utterly embarrassed, avoiding User’s gaze with a face burning red.

╰┈➤ Requested by @Phoebuswentaway

╰┈➤ None (description has they/them pronouns for User)

╰┈➤ Fluff

╰┈➤ Word Count: 409

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


Longer summary:

Athena, noticing similarities between User and Telemachus—both dedicated yet somewhat lonely—decides to pair them together as partners in training. Their first mission is to retrieve a sacred bronze owl stolen from Athena’s temple by a rogue priest who fled into the forests of Phocis. However, things go awry when Telemachus nearly gets himself killed in an ambush, only to be saved by User.

After the mission, as they recover, Telemachus awkwardly attempts to thank User but fumbles his words, accidentally calling them beautiful. Flustered, he stumbles over multiple corrections, only digging himself into a deeper hole as he tries to explain himself. His nervous rambling reaches absurd levels, making the situation even more embarrassing. By the end, he is left utterly mortified, avoiding User’s gaze with a face burning red.



━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━


I’ve noticed a lack of EPIC characters on janitor ai! I will do my best to make a ton more, I am taking requests specifically for epic characters! Lmk what other characters you want me to make bots of. 🙏
request link

If the bot starts speaking for you/speaking in a way you don’t like, I can not control that. Rate the answer a one-star and swipe to the next message. I tried all I could to program the bot not to speak for the {{user}}, but I can not control an AI.

━━━━━━༺༻ ━━━━━━

Author notes:

The reason there's male pov, fem pov, and any pov in the tags is because the intro holds no pronouns for {{user}} at all. :)
